titles.en: Saying What is Right under Two Conditions
Saying What is Right under Two Conditions

segments: : قال أبي عليه السلام: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: ما أنفق مؤمن من نفقة هي أحب إلى الله عز وجل من قول الحق في الرضا والغضب
arabic.text: : قال أبي عليه السلام: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله: ما أنفق مؤمن من نفقة هي أحب إلى الله عز وجل من قول الحق في الرضا والغضب

segments: 2-82 Muhammad ibn Ali Majiluyih - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his uncle Muhammad ibn Abil-Qasim quoted Harun ibn Muslim, on the authority of Mus’adat ibn Sadaqah, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “Nothing that a believer does is loved by the Honorable the Exalted God more than saying what is right whether he is pleased or angry.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 2-82 Muhammad ibn Ali Majiluyih - may God be pleased with him - narrated that his uncle Muhammad ibn Abil-Qasim quoted Harun ibn Muslim, on the authority of Mus’adat ibn Sadaqah, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) that God’s Prophet (MGB) said, “Nothing that a believer does is loved by the Honorable the Exalted God more than saying what is right whether he is pleased or angry.”

narratorChain.raw: 2-82 حدثنا محمد بن علي ماجيلويه رضي الله عنه، عن عمه محمد بن أبي القاسم، عن هارون بن مسلم، عن مسعدة بن صدقة، عن جعفر بن محمد عليهما السلام قال

parts.text: محمد بن علي ماجيلويه رضي الله عنه،
جعفر بن محمد عليهما السلام قال

titles.en: Saying What is Right under Two Conditions

segments: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد الله، عن أبيه، عن وهب بن وهب، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه عليهما السلام أنه قال: القتل قتلان، قتل كفارة، وقتل درجة، والقتال قتالان: قتال الفئة الكافرة حتى يسلموا، وقتال الفئة الباغية حتى يفيئوا
arabic.text: : حدثنا سعد بن عبد الله، عن أحمد بن أبي عبد الله، عن أبيه، عن وهب بن وهب، عن جعفر بن محمد، عن أبيه عليهما السلام أنه قال: القتل قتلان، قتل كفارة، وقتل درجة، والقتال قتالان: قتال الفئة الكافرة حتى يسلموا، وقتال الفئة الباغية حتى يفيئوا

segments: 2-83 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Ahmad ibn Aba Abdullah on the authority of his father, on the authority of Wahab ibn Wahab, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) , “There are two kinds of homicide: unintentional (or semi-intentional) and intentional. There are also two types of fighting: fighting with the rebellious atheists until they submit, and fighting with the Muslim rebels until they stop their rebellion.”
en.dr-ali-peiravi.text: 2-83 (The compiler of the book narrated) that his father - may God be pleased with him - narrated that Sa’ed ibn Abdullah quoted Ahmad ibn Aba Abdullah on the authority of his father, on the authority of Wahab ibn Wahab, on the authority of Ja’far ibn Muhammad (MGB) , on the authority of his father (MGB) , “There are two kinds of homicide: unintentional (or semi-intentional) and intentional. There are also two types of fighting: fighting with the rebellious atheists until they submit, and fighting with the Muslim rebels until they stop their rebellion.”

narratorChain.raw: 2-83 حدثنا أبي رضي الله عنه قال
